title: Add go 1.9.x to .travis.yml and remove go tip build temporarily
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add go v1.9.x to the mix and remove go tip temporarily.  This will fix #304's build issues.

comments.body: I think we can fix tip, by turning off ostree.
GGGGRRRRR!!!  I wasn't able to get travis to recognize the allow_failures section and Dan's ostree fix doesn't appear to work either.  Going to try a couple other things.
Ok I will merge, we should revisit Tip in a few days. but I would like to get stuff merged.
